title: Enhanced Farm Animals
description: Changes the cow, sheep, pig and chicken model to have a few more features, while not straying too far from vanilla.
body:
Gives the cow, pig, sheep and chicken a few more model features, making them a little bit cuter, while not deviating from their vanilla feel. Now updated to the Spring to Life drop!

**For Minecraft 1.21.5**

The pack includes:
- 2 sheep variants for warm and cold biomes
- 4 variants for warm, temperate and cold livestock
- 1 extremely rare variant for warm, temperate and cold livestock
- A golden, platinum and diamond variant for livestock
- Modified models with new additions such as ears
- Emissive textures for some of the variants

****

**Requires Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

****
